caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a television displaying the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in a stylized, glowing yellow font. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace with a pendant. Between them, a smaller inset video window shows a person in silver armor on a dark horse in a rugged, outdoor landscape. The caption at the bottom of this inset reads, "have been cheating death since i was 14." In the background, a shelf filled with various DVDs or games is visible beneath the television. Throughout the sequence, the men remain mostly still, though the man on the right maintains a pensive expression with his hand resting on his chin. The scene is static, with only minor shifts in the men's facial expressions as they watch the content.
